prompt: A long, complex SQL scroll being bookmarked with a colorful tab labeled with a short view name, and a person later pulling out just the bookmark to instantly access the full query result
full_prompt: editorial illustration for a programming textbook. A long, complex SQL scroll being bookmarked with a colorful tab labeled with a short view name, and a person later pulling out just the bookmark to instantly access the full query result Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational.
